case_title: DEREK WONG VS. RUIWEI MAI ET AL

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 61923968) FILED BY DEFENDANT MAI, RUIWEI
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100040938) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, DEREK JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR DANIEL K. DENENBERG.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, DEREK AS TO DEFENDANT MAI, RUIWEI DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-11-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-02-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-18-2018
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-10-2018. THE JUL-11-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE SEP-27-2018.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN FEES AND COSTS. (TRANSACTION ID # 63004502)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 18106010), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, DEREK SERVED FEB-24-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE FEB-27-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT MAI, RUIWEI
AMENDED ORDER TO CORRECT PROOF OF SERIVCE - ORDER TO ARBITRATION SENT BY COURT
ARBITRATOR JOHN A KOEPPEL APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-28-2018 THROUGH DEC-27-2018.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-28-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
